name: rundrill-aws
description: AWS cloud-certification coach — prep CLF/SAA/DVA/SOA/DEA/MLA, SAP/DOP, and the Security & Networking specialties by choosing the best service under constraints and reviewing real configs for the planted flaw, with drills, progress, mistake memory, and timed mock exams, inside your AI agent.

interface.shortDescription: AWS cloud-cert coach: choose the best service under constraints, review configs for the planted flaw, sit timed mock exams.
interface.longDescription: An interactive AWS certification coach for the whole ladder — Foundational (Cloud Practitioner, AI Practitioner) → Associate (Solutions Architect, Developer, SysOps, Data Engineer, ML Engineer) → Professional (Solutions Architect, DevOps) → Specialty (Security, Advanced Networking). Blended drills pair an exam-style scenario decision (choose the BEST service for the stated constraint — cost, latency, availability, security — and say why NOT the plausible alternatives) with a hands-on console/CLI/IaC task you run in your own AWS account. Signature drill: review a real AWS config (an IAM policy, a security-group/NACL ruleset, a VPC route table, a CloudFormation/Terraform snippet) and find the planted flaw — over-broad permissions, a single point of failure, an insecure default, an unreachable route, a cost trap. Plus timed, domain-weighted mock exams as a per-cert boss battle. Backed by the RunDrill MCP engine with progress tracking and mistake memory.
defaultPrompt: Give me a scenario and let me choose the right service and justify it.
Show me an IAM policy and let me find what's wrong with it.
